andrea.name: Andrea Engenharia
andrea.description: Complete refactoring and modernization of Andrea Engenharia's institutional website. The project involved restructuring the company's outdated digital presence, migrating it to a modern architecture. The main focus was replacing the legacy structure with a faster, responsive interface with better usability for clients.
